          · simp at heq ⊢; apply List.Perm.swap.trans
            rw [heq]; apply (perm_cons_eraseIdx l ⟨i, by simpa using hi⟩).trans
            exact List.Perm.swap x y _
          · simp at heq ⊢; apply List.Perm.swap.trans
            apply List.Perm.cons; apply List.Perm.cons
            apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := l[i])
            apply (perm_cons_eraseIdx l ⟨i, by simpa using hi⟩).symm.trans
            rw [heq]; exact perm_cons_eraseIdx l ⟨j, by simpa using hj⟩

intro idx1 idx2 h
          let perm_cons_eraseIdx {α} (l : List α) (i : Fin l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
            induction l with
            | nil => exact i.elim0
            | cons x xs ih =>
              match i with
              | ⟨0, _⟩ => apply List.Perm.refl
              | ⟨i+1, hi⟩ =>
                simp [List.eraseIdx_cons]
                apply List.Perm.trans (List.perm_swap x _ _)
                apply List.Perm.cons
                apply ih ⟨i, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi⟩
          match idx1, idx2 with
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => simp at h; subst y; apply List.Perm.refl
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ => apply List.Perm.refl
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j+2, hj⟩ => simp at h ⊢; rw [h]; apply perm_cons_eraseIdx
          | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => apply List.Perm.refl
          | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ => simp at h; subst x; apply List.Perm.refl
          | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨j+2, hj⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢; rw [h]
            apply List.Perm.trans (List.perm_swap x y _)
            apply List.Perm.cons; apply perm_cons_eraseIdx
          | ⟨k+2, hk⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢; rw [h]
            apply List.Perm.trans _ (perm_cons_eraseIdx _ _).symm
            apply List.Perm.swap
          | ⟨k+2, hk⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢; rw [h]
            apply List.Perm.trans _ (perm_cons_eraseIdx _ _).symm
            apply List.Perm.cons; apply List.Perm.swap
          | ⟨k+2, hk⟩, ⟨j+2, hj⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢
            apply List.Perm.trans (List.perm_swap x y _)
            apply List.Perm.cons; apply List.Perm.cons
            generalize h' : l[k] = v; rw [h'] at h; rw [← h]
            clear h' h idx1 idx2 x y
            induction l generalizing k j with
            | nil => exact (Nat.not_lt_zero _ hk).elim
            | cons z l ih =>
              match k, j with
              | 0, 0 => apply List.Perm.refl
              | 0, j+1 => simp [List.eraseIdx_cons]; apply perm_cons_eraseIdx
              | k+1, 0 => simp [List.eraseIdx_cons]; symmetry; apply perm_cons_eraseIdx
              | k+1, j+1 => simp [List.eraseIdx_cons]; apply List.Perm.cons; apply ih _ _ rfl

intro idx1 idx2 heq
          have lem (L : List α) (i : Fin L.length) : L.Perm (L[i] :: L.eraseIdx i) := by
            induction L with
            | nil => exact i.elim0
            | cons hd tl IH =>
              cases i using Fin.cases with
              | zero => simp; exact List.Perm.refl _
              | succ i =>
                simp only [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
                exact (List.Perm.cons hd (IH i)).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
          let p1 := lem _ idx1
          let p2 := lem _ idx2
          rw [heq] at p1
          exact List.Perm.cons_inv <| p1.symm.trans <| (List.Perm.swap x y l).trans p2

intro idx1 idx2 heq
          let i := idx1.1; let j := idx2.1
          have hi : i < (y :: x :: l).length := idx1.2
          have hj : j < (x :: y :: l).length := idx2.2
          simp only [List.length_cons] at hi hj
          let rec aux {l : List α} {i j : Nat} (hi : i < l.length) (hj : j < l.length) (h : l[i] = l[j]) :
            (l.eraseIdx i).Perm (l.eraseIdx j) := by
            match l, i, j with
            | [], _, _ => simp at hi
            | a::as, 0, 0 => apply List.Perm.refl
            | a::as, 0, j'+1 =>
              simp [List.eraseIdx_cons]; simp at h; subst a
              exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨j', by simp at hj; exact hj⟩).symm
            | a::as, i'+1, 0 =>
              simp [List.eraseIdx_cons]; simp at h; subst a
              exact List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨i', by simp at hi; exact hi⟩
            | a::as, i'+1, j'+1 =>
              simp [List.eraseIdx_cons]; apply List.Perm.cons
              apply aux (by simp at hi; exact hi) (by simp at hj; exact hj) h
          match i, j with
          | 0, 0 => simp at heq; subst x; simp [List.eraseIdx]; apply List.Perm.swap
          | 0, 1 => simp [List.eraseIdx]; apply List.Perm.refl
          | 1, 0 => simp [List.eraseIdx]; apply List.Perm.refl
          | 1, 1 => simp at heq; subst x; simp [List.eraseIdx]; apply List.Perm.swap
          | 0, j'+2 =>
            simp at heq; subst heq
            simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨j', by simp at hj; exact hj⟩).cons _
          | i'+2, 0 =>
            simp at heq; subst heq
            simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨i', by simp at hi; exact hi⟩).cons _ |>.symm
          | 1, j'+2 =>
            simp at heq; subst heq
            simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero]
            apply List.Perm.trans _ (List.Perm.swap x y _)
            exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨j', by simp at hj; exact hj⟩).cons _
          | i'+2, 1 =>
            simp at heq; subst heq
            simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero]
            apply List.Perm.trans (List.Perm.swap x y _)
            exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨i', by simp at hi; exact hi⟩).cons _ |>.symm
          | i'+2, j'+2 =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            apply List.Perm.trans (List.Perm.swap x y _)
            apply List.Perm.cons; apply List.Perm.cons
            apply aux (by simp at hi; exact hi) (by simp at hj; exact hj) heq

intro idx1 idx2 h
          simp only [Fin.getElem_fin, List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ] at h
          let ⟨i1, hi1⟩ := idx1
          let ⟨i2, hi2⟩ := idx2
          have perm_erase (l : List α) (k : Nat) (hk : k < l.length) :
            l.Perm (l[k] :: l.eraseIdx k) := by
            induction l generalizing k with
            | nil => contradiction
            | cons z zs ih =>
              cases k with
              | zero => simp; exact List.Perm.refl _
              | succ k =>
                simp [List.eraseIdx]
                trans z :: zs[k] :: zs.eraseIdx k
                · apply List.Perm.cons; apply ih (by simpa using hk)
                · apply List.Perm.swap
          have erase_same (l : List α) (k1 k2 : Nat) (h1 : k1 < l.length) (h2 : k2 < l.length) :
            l[k1] = l[k2] → (l.eraseIdx k1).Perm (l.eraseIdx k2) := by
            induction l generalizing k1 k2 with
            | nil => contradiction
            | cons z zs ih =>
              intro heq
              cases k1 <;> cases k2
              · apply List.Perm.refl
              · simp [List.eraseIdx]; simp at heq; subst z
                apply (perm_erase zs _ (by simpa using h2)).symm
              · simp [List.eraseIdx]; simp at heq; subst z
                apply perm_erase zs _ (by simpa using h1)
              · simp [List.eraseIdx]; simp at heq
                apply List.Perm.cons
                apply ih _ _ (by simpa using h1) (by simpa using h2) heq
          match i1, i2 with
          | 0, 0 =>
            simp at h; subst x; exact List.Perm.refl _
          | 0, 1 =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx]; exact List.Perm.refl _
          | 0, k+2 =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx]
            apply List.Perm.cons
            rw [h]; apply (perm_erase l k (by simpa using hi2)).symm
          | 1, 0 =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx]; exact List.Perm.refl _
          | 1, 1 =>
            simp at h; subst x; exact List.Perm.refl _
          | 1, k+2 =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx]
            trans y :: x :: l.eraseIdx k
            · apply List.Perm.cons; rw [h]; apply (perm_erase l k (by simpa using hi2)).symm
            · apply List.Perm.swap
          | k+2, 0 =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx]
            apply List.Perm.cons
            rw [←h]; apply perm_erase l k (by simpa using hi1)
          | k+2, 1 =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx]
            trans x :: y :: l.eraseIdx k
            · apply List.Perm.swap
            · apply List.Perm.cons; rw [←h]; apply perm_erase l k (by simpa using hi1)
          | k1+2, k2+2 =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx]
            trans x :: y :: l.eraseIdx k1
            · apply List.Perm.swap
            · apply List.Perm.cons
              apply List.Perm.cons
              apply erase_same l k1 k2 (by simpa using hi1) (by simpa using hi2) h

intro idx1 idx2 H
          simp only [List.length_cons, Fin.getElem_fin, List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ] at idx1 idx2 H
          rcases idx1 with ⟨i, hi⟩; rcases idx2 with ⟨j, hj⟩
          match i, j with
          | 0, 0 => simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_zero]; rw [H]; exact List.Perm.refl _
          | 0, 1 => simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]; exact List.Perm.refl _
          | 0, k+2 =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]; rw [H]
            exact List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨k, by simp at hj; exact hj⟩
          | 1, 0 => simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero]; exact List.Perm.refl _
          | 1, 1 => simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero]; rw [H]; exact List.Perm.refl _
          | 1, k+2 =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            apply List.Perm.trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
            apply List.Perm.cons; rw [H]
            exact List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨k, by simp at hj; exact hj⟩
          | k+2, 0 =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero]
            apply List.Perm.cons; rw [←H]
            exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨k, by simp at hi; exact hi⟩).symm
          | k+2, 1 =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero]
            apply List.Perm.trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
            apply List.Perm.cons; rw [←H]
            exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨k, by simp at hi; exact hi⟩).symm
          | k+2, p+2 =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            apply List.Perm.trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
            apply List.Perm.cons; apply List.Perm.cons
            apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := l[k])
            rw [H]
            apply List.Perm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨k, by simp at hi; exact hi⟩).symm
            exact List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨p, by simp at hj; exact hj⟩
